description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. He is dressed in a simple, casual outfit consisting of a short-sleeved t-shirt and knee-length shorts. The figure has a defined facial structure, short voluminous hair, and is barefoot. The skin tone is medium, and the overall appearance is realistic but stylized, with smooth surfaces and minimal textural detail. The clothing fits loosely, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's posture is neutral, suggesting he is at rest or waiting.
description: A barefoot adult male in a casual t-shirt and shorts, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has short, voluminous hair and a muscular build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full front of the t-shirt and shorts, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the arm's relaxed position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the back of the t-shirt and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the arm's relaxed position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and knee-length shorts
